revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=大野神社| 所在地=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042| 位置=| 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]]| 社格=式内社・旧村社| 創建=不明| }}
'''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]]にある[[神社]]である。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」である。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== 祭神 == *主神 :[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :[[天照大神]] :[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） *合祀 :[[菅原道真]]
== 所在地 == *愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:愛知県の神社]] [[Category:一宮市]] {{shinto-stub}}

contributor.username: ja>正進社はダーメダーメ!!!

== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== 祭神 == *主神 :[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :[[天照大神]] :[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） *合祀 :[[菅原道真]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== 祭神 ==" to "== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}"
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = 大野神社 (一宮市)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042 | 位置={{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]] | 社格=式内社・旧村社 | 創建=不明 }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:new pages]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:new pages]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== Worshipped deities (Saijin) ==↵{{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}" to "== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}}"
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = 大野神社 (一宮市)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042 | 位置={{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]] | 社格=式内社・旧村社 | 創建=不明 }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:new pages]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:new pages]]

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = 大野神社 (一宮市)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042 | 位置={{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]] | 社格=式内社・旧村社 | 創建=不明 }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:大野神社 (一宮市)}}[[Category:qq]]

{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = 大野神社 (一宮市)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042 | 位置={{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]] | 社格=式内社・旧村社 | 創建=不明 }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]][[Category:Pages to be written]]{{DEFAULTSORT:大野神社 (一宮市)}}[[Category:Pages to be written]]

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = 大野神社 (一宮市)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address=愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042 | 位置={{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | 祭神=[[八幡神|誉田別命]] [[天照大神]] [[建水方神]] | 社格=式内社・旧村社 | 創建=不明 }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[Sugawara no Michizane]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[Tōkaidō Main Line]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}}
[[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]]
[[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]] [[sn:大野神社 (一宮市)]]{{DEFAULTSORT:大野神社 (一宮市)}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)}} [[Category:Pages to be translated]]

[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。
== 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。
== Worshipped deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神}}}} ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[Sugawara no Michizane]]
== 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[Meitetsu]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[Tōkaidō Main Line]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き

{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大野神社 | 画像 = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町大野]]郷東1042 | 緯度度 = 35| 緯度分 = 21| 緯度秒 = 10.57 | 経度度 = 136| 経度分 = 49| 経度秒 = 29.83 | 祭神 = [[八幡神|誉田別命]]
[[天照大神]]
[[建水方神]] | 社格 = 式内社・旧村社 | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = Japan Aichi }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

revision.comment: 16 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大野神社 | 画像 = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = [[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町大野]]郷東1042 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = [[八幡神|誉田別命]]
[[天照大神]]
[[建水方神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]・旧[[村社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

[[建水方神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]・旧[[村社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

[[建水方神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]・旧[[村社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

[[建水方神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]・旧[[村社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

[[建水方神]] | 社格 = [[式内社]]・旧[[村社]] | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、[[愛知県]][[一宮市]][[浅井町 (愛知県)|浅井町]]にある[[神社]]。旧[[社格]]は村社。[[大野極楽寺公園]]の南、[[御囲堤]]の傍にある。 [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の[[尾張国]][[葉栗郡]]「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。[[江戸時代]]以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、[[1870年]]（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される[[石像]]（[[神像]]、[[仏像]]）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*[[八幡神|誉田別命]] :*[[天照大神]] :*[[建水方神]]（[[建御名方神]]と推測される） ;合祀 :*[[菅原道真]] == 交通機関 == *[[名鉄バス]]「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **[[名古屋鉄道]][[名鉄名古屋本線|名古屋本線]]・[[名鉄尾西線|尾西線]][[名鉄一宮駅]]、[[東海道本線]][[尾張一宮駅]]（[[名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル]]3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

'愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大野神社 | 画像 = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|浅井町大野|Q126912053}}郷東1042 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}
{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}}
{{jalink|建水方神}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|浅井町 (愛知県)|Q11556970|浅井町}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は村社。{{jalink|大野極楽寺公園|Q11439660}}の南、{{jalink|御囲堤|Q11488847}}の傍にある。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}「大野神社」。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、{{jalink|1870年|Q7741}}（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される{{jalink|石像|Q12573007}}（{{jalink|神像|Q11588751}}、{{jalink|仏像|Q1000809}}）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 === 祭神 === ;主神 :*{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}} :*{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|建水方神}}（{{jalink|建御名方神}}と推測される） ;合祀 :*{{jalink|菅原道真|Q382005}} === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「川島」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

{{jalink|建水方神}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|浅井町 (愛知県)|Q11556970|浅井町}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は村社。{{jalink|大野極楽寺公園|Q11439660}}の南、{{jalink|御囲堤|Q11488847}}の傍にある。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}「大野神社」。 === 概況 === *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、{{jalink|1870年|Q7741}}（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される{{jalink|石像|Q12573007}}（{{jalink|神像|Q11588751}}、{{jalink|仏像|Q1000809}}）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 === 祭神 === ;主神 :*{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}} :*{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|建水方神}}（{{jalink|建御名方神}}と推測される） ;合祀 :*{{jalink|菅原道真|Q382005}} === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「川島」行き === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおのしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=October 26, 2014 (Sun) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{Shinto shrine | Name = Ōno Shrine | Image = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | Location = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}{{jalink|Asai-chō Ōno|Q126912053}} Gōhigashi 1042 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}}
{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Established = Unknown | Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ōno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ōno Shrine''' (Ōno-jinja) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|Q11556970|Asai-chō}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine ranking system|Q10444029}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{jalink|Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660}}, near the {{jalink|Okakoi embankment|Q11488847}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}}, {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki shrine register}}. === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=October 26, 2014 (Sun) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{Shinto shrine | Name = Ōno Shrine | Image = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | Location = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}{{jalink|Asai-chō Ōno|Q126912053}} Gōhigashi 1042 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}}
{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Established = Unknown | Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ōno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ōno Shrine''' (Ōno-jinja) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|Q11556970|Asai-chō}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine ranking system|Q10444029}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{jalink|Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660}}, near the {{jalink|Okakoi embankment|Q11488847}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}}, {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki shrine register}}.https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181383 === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = '''Ono Shrine''' (Ichinomiya)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address = 1042, Higashi, Ono-gō, Asai-chō, Ichinomiya, Aichi Prefecture | location = {{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | enshrined_deities = {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}　{{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}　{{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | status = Shikinaisha・Former Village Shrine | foundation = Unknown }} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shrine rank|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Morio Embankment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shinzō|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Meitetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|en|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line}} and {{ill|Meitetsu Bisai Line|en|Meitetsu Bisai Line|WD=Q901005|lt=Meitetsu Onishi Line}} at {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|en|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q2856589|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}}, or from the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|ja|Tōkaidō Main Line|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Main Line|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|en|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q871495|lt=Owari Ichinomiya Station}} (Platform 3 at the {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = '''Ono Shrine''' (Ichinomiya)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address = 1042, Higashi, Ono-gō, Asai-chō, Ichinomiya, Aichi Prefecture | location = {{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | enshrined_deities = {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}　{{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}　{{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | status = Shikinaisha・Former Village Shrine | foundation = Unknown }} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shrine rank|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Morio Embankment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shinzō|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Meitetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|en|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line}} and {{ill|Meitetsu Bisai Line|en|Meitetsu Bisai Line|WD=Q901005|lt=Meitetsu Onishi Line}} at {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|en|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q2856589|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}}, or from the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|ja|Tōkaidō Main Line|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Main Line|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|en|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q871495|lt=Owari Ichinomiya Station}} (Platform 3 at the {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一宮駅バスターミナル|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|comment=changed Its former {{jalink|shrine ranking system|Q10444029}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{jalink|Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660}}, near the {{jalink|Okakoi embankment|Q11488847}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}}, {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki shrine register}}.https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181383 === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} == '愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=October 26, 2014 (Sun) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{Shinto shrine | Name = Ōno Shrine | Image = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | Location = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}{{jalink|Asai-chō Ōno|Q126912053}} Gōhigashi 1042 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}}
{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Established = Unknown | Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ōno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ōno Shrine''' (Ōno-jinja) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|Q11556970|Asai-chō}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine ranking system|Q10444029}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{jalink|Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660}}, near the {{jalink|Okakoi embankment|Q11488847}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}}, {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki shrine register}}.https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181383 === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = '''Ono Shrine''' (Ichinomiya)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address = 1042, Higashi, Ono-gō, Asai-chō, Ichinomiya, Aichi Prefecture | location = {{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | enshrined_deities = {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}　{{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}　{{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | status = Shikinaisha・Former Village Shrine | foundation = Unknown }} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shrine rank|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Morio Embankment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shinzō|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be '愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=October 26, 2014 (Sun) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{Shinto shrine | Name = Ōno Shrine | Image = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
Torii | Location = {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}{{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}{{jalink|Asai-chō Ōno|Q126912053}} Gōhigashi 1042 | Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}}
{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} | Shrine rank = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} | Established = Unknown | Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ōno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ōno Shrine''' (Ōno-jinja) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|Q11556970|Asai-chō}}, {{jalink|Ichinomiya City|Q270810}}, {{jalink|Aichi Prefecture|Q80434}}. Its former {{jalink|shrine ranking system|Q10444029}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{jalink|Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660}}, near the {{jalink|Okakoi embankment|Q11488847}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{jalink|Haguri District|Q1032507}}, {{jalink|Owari Province|Q514506}} in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki shrine register}}.https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181383 === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{jalink|1870|Q7741}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{jalink|stone statues|Q12573007}}—{{jalink|Shinto deity statues|Q11588751}}, {{jalink|Buddhist statues|Q1000809}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{jalink|Hachiman|Q261637|Hondawake no Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|Takemizuwake no Kami}} (presumed to be {{jalink|Takeminakata no Kami}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{jalink|Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{jalink|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589}} on the {{jalink|Nagoya Railroad|Q30850}}{{jalink|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|Nagoya Main Line}} / {{jalink|Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|Bisai Line}}, or from {{jalink|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495}} on the {{jalink|Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ono Shrine}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]] [[Category:pages]]

It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{infobox religious building | name = '''Ono Shrine''' (Ichinomiya)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto}}|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address = 1042, Higashi, Ono-gō, Asai-chō, Ichinomiya, Aichi Prefecture | location = {{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | enshrined_deities = {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}　{{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}}　{{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | status = Shikinaisha・Former Village Shrine | foundation = Unknown }} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shrine rank|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Morio Embankment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=shinzō|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Meitetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|en|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line}} and {{ill|Meitetsu Bisai Line|en|Meitetsu Bisai Line|WD=Q901005|lt=Meitetsu Onishi Line}} at {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|en|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q2856589|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}}, or from the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|ja|Tōkaidō Main Line|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Main Line|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|en|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q871495|lt=Owari Ichinomiya Station}} (Platform 3 at the {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus {{出典の明記|date=2014年10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} {{神社 | 名称 = 大野神社 | 画像 = [[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|250px]]
鳥居 | 所在地 = {{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|浅井町大野|Q126912053}}郷東1042 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}}
{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}}
{{jalink|建水方神}} | 社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}・旧{{jalink|村社}} | 創建 = 不明 | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=大野神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''大野神社'''（おおのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|愛知県|Q80434}}{{jalink|一宮市|Q270810}}{{jalink|浅井町 (愛知県)|Q11556970|浅井町}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は村社。{{jalink|大野極楽寺公園|Q11439660}}の南、{{jalink|御囲堤|Q11488847}}の傍にある。 {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の{{jalink|尾張国|Q514506}}{{jalink|葉栗郡|Q1032507}}「大野神社」。 == 概況 == *創建時期は不明。元々は現在地のやや南であったという。 *元々は水に関わる神社であったという。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}以前に誉田別命が祀られたことにより八幡神社に改称していたが、{{jalink|1870年|Q7741}}（明治3年）に大野神社に改称している。 *神社の境内の一部は大野公民館になっている。境内にはかつて祭られていたと推測される{{jalink|石像|Q12573007}}（{{jalink|神像|Q11588751}}、{{jalink|仏像|Q1000809}}）や石碑が無造作に存在する。 == 祭神 == ;主神 :*{{jalink|八幡神|Q261637|誉田別命}} :*{{jalink|天照大神|Q455602}} :*{{jalink|建水方神}}（{{jalink|建御名方神}}と推測される） ;合祀 :*{{jalink|菅原道真|Q382005}} == 交通機関 == *{{jalink|名鉄バス|Q6810397}}「大野」バス停下車、徒歩3分 **{{jalink|名古屋鉄道|Q30850}}{{jalink|名鉄名古屋本線|Q1137838|名古屋本線}}・{{jalink|名鉄尾西線|Q901005|尾西線}}{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅|Q2856589}}、{{jalink|東海道本線|Q1190152}}{{jalink|尾張一宮駅|Q871495}}（{{jalink|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル}}3番のりば）より「川島」行き == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:一宮市の神社]] [[Category:尾張国の式内社]] [[Category:愛知県の旧村社]]

{{ill|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602|WD=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemizuwake no Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} | Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | Established = Unknown | Map = {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Ōno Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} {{infobox religious building | name = '''Ono Shrine''' (Ichinomiya)|native_name=大野神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|WD=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|image=[[File:Ono-jinja, Ichinomiya.jpg|300px]] | address = 1042, Higashi, Ono-gō, Asai-chō, Ichinomiya, Aichi Prefecture | location = {{Coord|35|21|10.57|N|136|49|29.83|E|scale:30000_region:JP-23}} | enshrined_deities = {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}}　{{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}　{{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | status = Shikinaisha・Former Village Shrine | foundation = Unknown }} {{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社 (一宮市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakaku|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Q11488847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District|1=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Idols in Shinto|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue|1=Buddha in art}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Q11415661|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|en|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line|1=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line}} and {{ill|Meitetsu Bisai Line|en|Meitetsu Bisai Line|WD=Q901005|lt=Meitetsu Onishi Line|1=Meitetsu Bisai Line}} at {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|en|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q2856589|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}}, or from the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|ja|Tōkaidō Main Line|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Main Line|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|en|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q871495|lt=Owari Ichinomiya Station|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (Platform 3 at the {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一宮駅バスターミナル|1=Q11415757|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415757}}) for the "Kawashima" bus. {{shinto-stub}} {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|大野神社 (P3225) == * 2180005009777 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県一宮市浅井町大野郷東1042', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大野神社 (一宮市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11439718}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=October 26, 2014 (Sun) 11:02 (UTC)~}} '''Ōno Shrine''' (Ōno-jinja) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|Q11556970|WD=Q11556970|lt=Asai-chō|1=Azai}}, {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya City|Q270810|WD=Q270810|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|WD=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine ranking system|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} status was that of a village shrine. It is located south of {{ill|lt=Ōno Gokurakuji Park|Q11439660|WD=Q11439660|1=Onogokurakuji Park}}, near the {{ill|lt=Okakoi embankment|Q11488847|WD=Q11488847|1=Okakoi embankment}}. It is listed as the “Ōno Shrine” of {{ill|lt=Haguri District|Q1032507|WD=Q1032507|1=Haguri District}}, {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|WD=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki shrine register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}.https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181383 === Overview === * The date of establishment is unknown. It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{ill|lt=1870|Q7741|WD=Q7741|1=1870}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{ill|lt=stone statues|Q12573007|WD=Q12573007|1=Stone sculpture}}—{{ill|lt=Shinto deity statues|Q11588751|WD=Q11588751|1=Idols in Shinto}}, {{ill|lt=Buddhist statues|Q1000809|WD=Q1000809|1=Buddha in art}}) and stone monuments, presumed to have once been worshipped, exist in a disorderly manner. === Enshrined Deities === ;Main deities :*{{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|WD=Q261637|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} :*{{ill|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|Q455602|WD=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takemizuwake no Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} (presumed to be {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata no Kami|1=Takeminakata}}) ;Enshrined together :*{{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|WD=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} === Transportation === * Get off at the “Ōno” bus stop on {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bus|Q6810397|WD=Q6810397|1=Meitetsu Bus}}, then walk 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|Q2856589|WD=Q2856589|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Nagoya Railroad|Q30850|WD=Q30850|1=Meitetsu}}{{ill|lt=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|Q1137838|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line|1=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line}} / {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Bisai Line|Q901005|WD=Q901005|lt=Bisai Line|1=Meitetsu Bisai Line}}, or from {{ill|lt=Owari-Ichinomiya Station|Q871495|WD=Q871495|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|Q1190152|WD=Q1190152|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} (Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal, platform 3), take the bus bound for “Kawashima.” === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakaku|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Q11488847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District|1=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Idols in Shinto|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue|1=Buddha in art}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Q11415661|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu It is said that the shrine was originally located slightly south of its present site. * It is said to have originally been a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, after Hondawake no Mikoto was enshrined, it was renamed a Hachiman Shrine; however, in {{ill|lt=1870|Q7741|WD=Q7741|1=1870}} (Meiji 3), it was renamed Ōno Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now serves as the Ōno Community Center. Within the grounds, stone statues ({{ill|lt=stone statues|Q12573007|WD=Q12573007|1=Stone sculpture}}—{{ill|lt=Shinto deity statues|Q11588751|WD=Q11588751|1=Idols in Shinto}}, {{ill|lt=Buddhist It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakaku|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Q11488847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District|1=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Idols in Shinto|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue|1=Buddha in art}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == It is located in [[Owari Province]]. {{Unreferenced|date=2014th year 10月26日 (日) 11:02 (UTC)~}} '''Ono Shrine''' (大野神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|en|Ichinomiya, Aichi|WD=Q270810|lt=Ichinomiya|1=Ichinomiya, Aichi}}, {{ill|Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|ja|浅井町 (愛知県)|lt=Asai Town|lt_ja=浅井町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Town (Aichi Prefecture)|1=Azai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556970}}. Its former {{ill|Shrine Status|ja|社格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Status|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shakaku|WD=Q10444029}} was that of a Village Shrine. It is situated to the south of {{ill|Ono Gokurakuji Park|ja|大野極楽寺公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gokurakuji Park|1=Onogokurakuji Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439660}} and beside the {{ill|Morio Embankment|ja|御囲堤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Morio Embankment|1=Q11488847|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488847}}. It is the "Ono Shrine" of the {{ill|Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|lt=Shikinaisha|lt_ja=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Warrant of Deities of the Engi Era|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} in {{ill|Owari Province|en|Owari Province|WD=Q514506|lt=Owari Province|1=Owari Province}}, {{ill|Haguri District|en|Haguri District|WD=Q1032507|lt=Haguri District|1=Haguri District}}. == Overview == * The date of foundation is unknown. It is said that the original location was slightly to the south of the current site. * It is believed that this was originally a shrine associated with water. Before the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, due to the enshrinement of {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}}, it was renamed as a Hachiman Shrine, but in {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} (the 3rd year of Meiji) it was renamed Ono Shrine. * Part of the shrine grounds now house the Ono Community Center. Within the precincts, various stone statues (including {{ill|Divine Statue|ja|神像|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Divine Statue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Idols in Shinto|WD=Q11588751}} and {{ill|Buddha in art|en|Buddha in art|WD=Q1000809|lt=Buddhist Statue|1=Buddha in art}}) and stone monuments—presumed to have once been enshrined—are scattered about. == Worshipped Deities (Saijin) == {{see also|{{ill|Saijin|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saijin|qq=}}}} ; Principal Deities :* {{ill|Hachiman|en|Hachiman|WD=Q261637|lt=Hotabebito no Mikoto|1=Hachiman}} :* {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|WD=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} :* {{ill|Tatemizukata no Kami|ja|建水方神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatemizukata no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (believed to be the same as {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}) ; Co-Enshrined :* {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Transportation == * Get off at the "Ono" bus stop of the {{ill|Meitetsu Bus|en|Meitetsu Bus|WD=Q6810397|lt=Meitetsu Bus|1=Meitetsu Bus}} and walk for 3 minutes. ** From {{ill|Meitetsu|ja|名鉄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu|1=Q11415661|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415661}}’s {{ill|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|en|Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line|WD=Q1137838|lt=Nagoya Main Line|1=Meitetsu Nagoya Main Line}} and {{ill|Meitetsu Bisai Line|en|Meitetsu Bisai Line|WD=Q901005|lt=Meitetsu Onishi Line|1=Meitetsu Bisai Line}} at {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|en|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q2856589|lt=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station|1=Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station}}, or from the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|ja|Tōkaidō Main Line|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkaidō Main Line|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|en|Owari-Ichinomiya Station|WD=Q871495|lt=Owari Ichinomiya Station|1=Owari-Ichinomiya Station}} (Platform 3 at the {{ill|Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja|名鉄一宮駅バスターミナル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitetsu Ichinomiya Station Bus Terminal|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一宮駅バスターミナル|1=Q11415757|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11415757}}) for the "Kawashima" bus. {{shinto-stub}} {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|大野神社 (一宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)|qq=}} {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)|ja|大野神社 (一宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ichinomiya)|qq=}} {{ill|Ono Shrine
